title: Crispy Tangy Polish Blueberries Salad
description: A bright, crunch‑laden salad that balances sweet blueberries with tart vinegar and fresh dill, perfect for a quick, comforting bite on a sick day.

ingredients.name: sliced almonds
ingredients.notes: toast in a dry pan until fragrant

instructions: Wash the blueberries and pat dry with paper towels.
Blanch the kale in boiling water for 30 seconds, then shock in ice water and squeeze out excess moisture before chopping finely.
Toast the millet in a dry skillet over medium heat until lightly browned, then set aside to cool.
In a small bowl, whisk together apple cider vinegar, maple syrup, lemon zest, chopped dill, and sea salt until the mixture emulsifies.
Heat a dry skillet over medium heat and toast the sliced almonds until golden and fragrant, about 3 minutes; remove and let cool.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the blueberries, chopped kale, toasted millet, and toasted almonds.
Pour the dressing over the salad and gently toss to coat everything evenly.
Serve immediately on two plates for a fresh, crunchy bite.
